author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: writing a FUSED Adam PTX kernel instead of decomposed ops. One kernel launch does the entire Adam update in a single pass over memory: updates param, exp_avg, and exp_avg_sq in-place. This is 1 kernel launch instead of ~12 with decomposed ops, and matches PyTorch's FusedAdam approach. State precision drops from f64 to f32 on GPU — acceptable, PyTorch does the same. Non-GPU/non-f32 params keep the existing CPU f64 path.
